command:
printf '--- state ---
'; find ~/.openclaw/state -maxdepth 3 -type f 2>/dev/null | sort | sed 's#^#/#' | head -200; printf '
--- maybe manifests ---
'; grep -RIn "capabilities\|tools\|runtime\|agent=" ~/.openclaw/state 2>/dev/null | head -200

printf '--- workspace/root ---
'; ls -la; printf '
--- .openclaw top ---
'; ls -la ~/.openclaw; printf '
--- docs hints ---
'; find /app/docs -maxdepth 2 -type f 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,80p'
